items: User clarified that a LaTeX engine/setup is already configured at `~/Projects/Research/Paper` and asked that it be used for future LaTeX PDF summary/report generation for papers.
For future paper PDF summaries using that LaTeX workflow, summaries can be more verbose, but all explanations/arguments must stay grounded in the paper itself.
Include mathematical reasoning from the paper when important.
Cap paper PDF summaries at 3 pages maximum.
Default future paper workflow when user sends a paper or paper link:
Ran `openclaw doctor`; main issue flagged was missing Mistral API key / memory search provider setup.
Daily AI cluster networking brief successfully ran and published after some delay; brief and archive links were delivered.
User asked about several papers and repos, including OpenSUN-FPGA, a congestion-control paper for spraying, SGLB, and specific LoL esports results.
Migrated assistant identity away from the disabled Google account to a new Outlook account: `dittoassistant.lwj@outlook.com`.
Switched GitHub auth and website publishing to new GitHub account `dittoassistant-lwj`; new main site URL is `https://dittoassistant-lwj.github.io/`.
Added a daily memory dashboard to the personal website and wired an automatic nightly publish job.
Simplified both `/memory/` and `/briefs/` index pages so they show only dates as clickable links.
Connected to Ethan's Notion workspace and confirmed access to the Reading List page and the `Papers` database.
User prefers concise replies, does not want tool/action logs or exact commands surfaced unless explicitly requested.
User wants more casual tone and more emojis in normal conversation.
Default timezone for scheduling and time references should be Hong Kong time (GMT+8) unless told otherwise.
Set up OpenCode local config with custom yunwu.ai baseURL and shared API key auth; smoke test passed.
Created ~/Projects as the default folder for future coding projects.
Set up GitHub CLI auth for account `dittoailwj`; created repos `dittos.github.io` and `dittoailwj.github.io`.
Built and deployed Ditto personal website with clean URL at https://dittoailwj.github.io/ ; old project URL https://dittoailwj.github.io/dittos.github.io/ is also still updated.
Added documents section, published scale-up networking report webpage, and added daily briefs archive page at /briefs/.
First conversation with Ethan Lau.
Assistant identity established: Ditto 🤖.
Role: personal assistant.
Preferred vibe: professional most of the time, a bit fun outside work settings.
Ethan is a network researcher specializing in scale-up networking.
Expectation: help offload research-related tasks to improve productivity.
User preference: call Ethan "boss" from now on.
User is currently in Hong Kong; use GMT+8 for time references in the future.
